---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents:
    - projects/gms.qmd
    - projects/chiral_db.qmd
    - projects/decompgti.qmd
    - projects/page_sequencing.qmd
    - projects/image_classification.qmd
    - projects/tedxiitgandhinagar.qmd
    - projects/elevateed.qmd
    - projects/leaderboard_pro.qmd
    - projects/academic_outreach.qmd
    - projects/map.qmd
    - projects/electricity_consumption_predictor.qmd
    - projects/vcw.qmd
    - projects/jkt.qmd
    - projects/car_purchase_classification.qmd
  sort: false
  template: projects-grid.ejs
  categories: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, description, categories, github, live-demo]
  id: custom-projects-list
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {#custom-projects-list}
:::

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 30px; margin-bottom: 50px;">
  <a href="https://github.com/yuvraj-rathod-1202" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank" role="button">Check GitHub for more projects</a>
</div>
